analysis: The project contains multiple website versions (test-website, github-page, docs) with HTML, CSS, and JS files. The event specifies a theme about black holes with bulk animated objects, slides, and pages. Current files show incomplete implementations with pending tasks related to black hole themes, animations, and mobile responsiveness. The CSS files need enhancement with cosmic/dark themes, animated black hole visuals, and swirling effects.

improvements.description: Enhance the CSS with a dark cosmic theme including black hole animations, swirling effects, glowing elements, and smooth transitions for an immersive black hole experience.
Complete the HTML structure with sections for black hole information, interactive animated elements, and a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon.
Implement JavaScript functions for animated slides, bulk animated objects, smooth navigation, and interactive black hole features with proper event handling.
